TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Fred_Boyd, title = Fred_Boyd, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fred_Boyd} }

S.FORM: Fred Boyd sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1950, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 6, Fred Boyd, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Fred Boyd sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1950, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 6, Fred Boyd, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *re* βoj* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *re* βoj*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
